title: LiveSourceResponse v1.12-t
description: Normalized response schema for v112T one-shot free-source plan. Defines the shape of data returned by a live source adapter (CoinGecko/CoinCap). This schema is used for validation and mock generation in v112T, and will be the contract for v112U live dry-run.

source_name.description: Name of the data source that produced this response

fetched_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of when the response was fetched (client-side time)

request_mode.description: Execution mode. v112T always uses planned_one_shot (no actual request). v112U will use live_one_shot.

assets.description: Array of asset data objects, one per asset in the response

asset_id.description: Source-specific asset identifier (e.g., 'bitcoin', 'ethereum' for CoinGecko; 'bitcoin', 'ethereum' for CoinCap)

price_change_pct.description: Price change percentage. For CoinGecko primary: 24h change. For CoinCap fallback: 24h change. 1h change may be available from CoinGecko but is not required.

price_change_pct_1h.description: 1-hour price change percentage. Available from CoinGecko, NOT from CoinCap. Null when unavailable.

volume_change_pct.description: 24h volume change percentage. Available from CoinGecko. May be computed or null from CoinCap.

open_interest_change_pct.description: Open interest change percentage. NOT available from free CoinGecko/CoinCap REST APIs. Always null in v112T free-source plan. Required for full v112Q compliance.

last_updated_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of when the source last updated this asset's data (source-side time)

source_latency_ms.description: Estimated latency from source last_updated to client fetched_at, in milliseconds. Null if not computable.

raw_source_fields.description: The raw fields as returned by the source, preserved for lineage/debugging. Structure varies by source.

validation_status.description: Overall validation status of this response

stop_decision.description: The stop condition decision for this response

stop_decision_reasons.description: List of reasons that contributed to the stop_decision

cross_source_validation.description: Results of cross-source validation when both CoinGecko and CoinCap returned data

performed.description: Whether cross-source validation was performed (requires both sources to return data)

price_divergence_pct.description: Maximum price divergence between sources, as percentage. Null if not performed.

timestamp_divergence_seconds.description: Maximum timestamp divergence between sources, in seconds. Null if not performed.

assets_compared.description: Number of assets present in both sources and available for comparison

eligible_for_real_send.description: Whether this response is eligible for real TG send. v112T policy: ALWAYS false, regardless of data quality.

assets_requested.description: Number of assets requested from the source

assets_returned.description: Number of assets actually returned by the source

request_duration_ms.description: Actual request duration in milliseconds. 0 in planned_one_shot mode.
